name: mnemex
description: Seven-layer code memory — benchmarked. AST-aware chunking, symbol graph with PageRank, semantic + BM25 retrieval. Personal, team-shared, offline-first, any embedding or LLM provider. MCP server + CLI.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun run download-grammars && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --external @lancedb/lancedb --external better-sqlite3 && cp src/benchmark-v2/storage/schema.sql dist/ && chmod +x dist/index.js
scripts.build:binary: bun run download-grammars && bun build src/index.ts --compile --external @opentui/core --external @opentui/react --outfile mnemex
scripts.build:binary:linux: bun run download-grammars && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --external @opentui/core --external @opentui/react --outfile mnemex-linux-x64
scripts.build:binary:mac: bun run download-grammars && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --external @opentui/core --external @opentui/react --outfile mnemex-darwin-arm64

author: Jack Rudenko <i@madappgang.com>
